items.title: De'Anthony Melton reportedly declined his $3.45 million player option with the Warriors
items.author: Warriors on NBC Sports Bay Area
items.body_excerpt: De'Anthony Melton reportedly declined his $3.45 million player option with the Warriors

media.title: De'Anthony Melton reportedly declines $3.45M player option with Warriors to enter NBA free agency
media.description: Warriors guard De'Anthony Melton reportedly declined his player option for the 2026-27 NBA season with Golden State worth $3.45 million.

items.title: De'Anthony Melton declined his player option with the Golden State Warriors, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
De'Anthony Melton declined his player option with the Golden State Warriors, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Melton will be an unrestricted free agent this offseason.

items.title: If the Sixers have Josh Hart as their "role player" (over De'Anthony Melton, PJ Tucker, etc) over the last 5 years, how many Conference Finals appearances do they have on their resume?
items.author: Derek Bodner
